pass_condition: production root marker file exists and declares production_root=true
operator-supplied deployment root identity exists
collector identity exists and binds collector_id
operator trust policy exists and is externally produced
external attestation exists and is not collector-generated
counter source file exists for measured telemetry
time source exists and is fresh
output root is writable
attestation producer differs from collector producer
deployment_root_identity_file exists and is the source material for root_enrollment: deployment root identity must come from operator enrollment material
external_attestation_file exists and is the source material for attestation_envelope: attestation must be supplied by hardware/KMS/HSM or external attester, not generated by this collector
operator_trust_policy_file exists and is the source material for trust_policy: operator trust policy must be supplied and signed outside the collector
bundle_manifest_file exists and is the source material for intake_custody: collector can observe local manifest and output custody path
adapter_conformance_file exists and is the source material for adapter_conformance: collector can bind an adapter conformance report produced by the adapter/conformance kit
time_source_file exists and is the source material for timebase_integrity: collector can observe time source freshness and measurement window
redaction_report_file exists and is the source material for redaction_integrity: collector can bind redaction evaluator output
gatechain_report_file exists and is the source material for evidence_gatechain: derived replay consumes prior gate outputs
uncertainty_report_file exists and is the source material for uncertainty_qualification: collector can bind confidence report produced from captured telemetry
causal_control_report_file exists and is the source material for causal_attribution: control-arm/covariate material must be supplied by experiment owner
threshold_replay_file exists and is the source material for dc001_dc002_threshold_replay: collector can bind threshold replay output from telemetry counters
planner_boundary_file exists and is the source material for planner_readiness_boundary: derived boundary consumes threshold, security, and planner outputs
handoff_traceability_file exists and is the source material for final_handoff_traceability: operator must supply final claim-to-evidence traceability material
